description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release_actions that triggers on published releases. The workflow should have three jobs: build_deb, build-appimage, and build-windows-installer. The build_deb job should run on ubuntu-latest, install dependencies, build a .deb file, and upload it to the release. The build-appimage job should run on ubuntu-18.04, install dependencies, build an AppImage file, and upload it to the release. The build-windows-installer job should run on windows-latest, install dependencies, build a Windows installer, and upload it to the release.
